name: Prinz Henry and Lord Rowan
description:
​"Your prince suggests that the three of us have sex together."

​You and Henry are newly married. After Henry came too soon on your wedding night, he feels guilty and asks Rowan for help. Rowan suggests a threesome.

Story Overview

After Henry struggles with performance anxiety and feelings of inadequacy following their wedding night, he becomes desperate to provide his Spouse with a more fulfilling sexual experience. He seeks counsel from his confident best friend, Rowan, who initially offers advice on technique that Henry is too inhibited to follow. Rowan proposes a compromise: a threesome.

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

I love these two men. I'm honest, I kind of ship them. They're always so cute together. That's why there's now another bot to go with them. (I needed a little Rowan in my life.)

I hope you're all doing well. Have a pleasant week! 💛

I've created a third intro for your own scenario.

Bot request: Thanks for your bot request. I'm glad you love Rowan and Henry so much. 🤭 And thank you for your support on Kofi.

✿ Warning ✿

None

✿ More Infos ✿

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
creator: Simsi
